# CWE-301 — Reflection Attack in an Authentication Protocol (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-301-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: server echoes client challenge as the authentication proof.
func MutualAuth(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	challenge := r.FormValue("challenge")
	if challenge == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing challenge", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"proof": challenge})
}
